title: OnlyFans Mom Leaves Toddler to Starve With Dead Baby

beats.description: Dramatic opening quotes from 911 call and social media videos establish immediate tension.
Narrator introduces the 911 dispatch, the mother's online murder claims, and initial police response.
911 audio plays, followed by detailed narration of the police discovery of the deceased infant and severely neglected toddler.
Bodycam footage captures the mother's arrest, initial police commands, and transport to the station.
Interviews with friends, ex-boyfriend, and parents establish a history of neglect, CPS involvement, and timeline gaps.
Interrogation begins; detective presses on feeding schedules, drug use, and the mysterious babysitter 'KK' as inconsistencies mount.
Investigators discover 'KK' is actually a friend who has been in jail for three weeks, completely dismantling the mother's alibi.
Detective confronts the mother with photos of the emaciated toddler, triggering a severe emotional breakdown and realization of guilt.
Final interrogation moments, emotional phone call with mother, formal charges, past animal neglect context, and case resolution.

_analysis_metadata.transcript_preview: I swear to God, my baby was just murdered. Okay. >> If a sitter left your kid to die, you would air out the sitter's name. She's a liar. >> Watch out for KK. If you know who KK is, shoot that. >> So, it's really hard to think that she would actually do that. >> My heart goes out to the police officers. >> Yeah. >> I cannot even imagine. I don't know. No dead baby jokes. They're not funny anymore. >> A chilling 911 call leads police to a house of unimaginable horror where two abandoned children are found in a heartbreaking scene that defies explanation. ...
